name: clankermux
description: Load balancer proxy for Claude API with intelligent distribution across multiple OAuth accounts to avoid rate limiting

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && bun -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('../../packages/proxy/src/embedded-tiktoken-wasm.ts')) { const wasm=fs.readFileSync('../../node_modules/@dqbd/tiktoken/lite/tiktoken_bg.wasm'); const wasmEncoded=wasm.toString('base64'); fs.writeFileSync('../../packages/proxy/src/embedded-tiktoken-wasm.ts', 'export const EMBEDDED_TIKTOKEN_WASM = \"' + wasmEncoded + '\";'); }" && bun -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('../../packages/database/src/inline-vacuum-worker.ts')) { fs.writeFileSync('../../packages/database/src/inline-vacuum-worker.ts', 'export const EMBEDDED_VACUUM_WORKER_CODE = \"\";'); }" && bun -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('../../packages/database/src/inline-integrity-check-worker.ts')) { fs.writeFileSync('../../packages/database/src/inline-integrity-check-worker.ts', 'export const EMBEDDED_INTEGRITY_CHECK_WORKER_CODE = \"\";'); }" && bun build ../../packages/proxy/src/post-processor.worker.ts --outfile dist/post-processor.worker.js --target=bun --minify && bun -e "const fs=require('fs'); const code=fs.readFileSync('dist/post-processor.worker.js','utf8'); const encoded=Buffer.from(code).toString('base64'); fs.writeFileSync('../../packages/proxy/src/inline-worker.ts', 'export const EMBEDDED_WORKER_CODE = \"' + encoded + '\";');" && bun build ../../packages/database/src/vacuum-worker.ts --outfile dist/vacuum-worker.js --target=bun --minify && bun -e "const fs=require('fs'); const code=fs.readFileSync('dist/vacuum-worker.js','utf8'); const encoded=Buffer.from(code).toString('base64'); fs.writeFileSync('../../packages/database/src/inline-vacuum-worker.ts', 'export const EMBEDDED_VACUUM_WORKER_CODE = \"' + encoded + '\";');" && bun build ../../packages/database/src/integrity-check-worker.ts --outfile dist/integrity-check-worker.js --target=bun --minify && bun -e "const fs=require('fs'); const code=fs.readFileSync('dist/integrity-check-worker.js','utf8'); const encoded=Buffer.from(code).toString('base64'); fs.writeFileSync('../../packages/database/src/inline-integrity-check-worker.ts', 'export const EMBEDDED_INTEGRITY_CHECK_WORKER_CODE = \"' + encoded + '\";');" && rm -f dist/clankermux && bun build src/main.ts --compile --outfile dist/clankermux --target=bun --minify --define __CLANKERMUX_VERSION__='\"'$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")'\"' && rm -f dist/post-processor.worker.js dist/vacuum-worker.js dist/integrity-check-worker.js
scripts.build:linux-amd64: bun run build && bun build src/main.ts --compile --outfile dist/clankermux-linux-amd64 --target=bun-linux-amd64 --minify
scripts.build:linux-arm64: bun run build && bun build src/main.ts --compile --outfile dist/clankermux-linux-arm64 --target=bun-linux-arm64 --minify
scripts.build:macos-x86_64: bun run build && bun build src/main.ts --compile --outfile dist/clankermux-macos-x86_64 --target=bun-darwin-x64 --minify
scripts.build:macos-arm64: bun run build && bun build src/main.ts --compile --outfile dist/clankermux-macos-arm64 --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --minify
scripts.build:windows-x64: bun run build && bun build src/main.ts --compile --outfile dist/clankermux-windows-x64.exe --target=bun-windows-x64 --minify
scripts.prepublishOnly: cp ../../README.md . && bun run --cwd ../.. build:dashboard && bun run build && jq 'del(.dependencies["@clankermux/cli-commands", "@clankermux/config", "@clankermux/core", "@clankermux/core-di", "@clankermux/database", "@clankermux/logger", "@clankermux/server"])' package.json > package.json.tmp && mv package.json.tmp package.json
